name: Bar: collapse media slot when nothing is playing
description: Shrinks the bar's media/resources group to its natural width when no track is playing, instead of holding the full centerSideModuleWidth slot. Disable to keep the slot at full width all the time.
author: rom4ik

patches.replace:
Resources {
                id: resourcesWidget
                alwaysShowAllResources: root.useShortenedForm === 2
                Layout.fillWidth: root.useShortenedForm === 2

Media {
                id: mediaWidget
                visible: root.useShortenedForm < 2 && MprisController.activePlayer?.trackTitle?.length > 0
                Layout.fillWidth: true

patches.find:
id: leftCenterGroup
            anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
            implicitWidth: root.centerSideModuleWidth
patches.replace:
id: leftCenterGroup
            anchors.verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
            implicitWidth: (root.useShortenedForm === 2) ? root.centerSideModuleWidth :
                           (MprisController.activePlayer?.trackTitle?.length > 0) ?
                           root.centerSideModuleWidth : resourcesWidget.implicitWidth + (mediaWidget.visible ? mediaWidget.implicitWidth + 4 : 0)
